title: Schema Change (DDL) Handling Flow
interaction_flow: BinlogConnector → BinlogDatabaseSchema: parseStreamingDdl(partition, ddlStatements, databaseName, offset, sourceTime) [or parseSnapshotDdl]
BinlogDatabaseSchema → BinlogDatabaseSchema: parseDdl(partition, ddlStatements, databaseName, offset, sourceTime, snapshot)
parseDdl: check ignoredQueryStatements (BEGIN/END/FLUSH PRIVILEGES) → return empty list if matched
BinlogDatabaseSchema → AntlrDdlParser: setCurrentSchema(databaseName)
BinlogDatabaseSchema → AntlrDdlParser: parse(ddlStatements, tables()) → DdlChanges
AntlrDdlParser: CharStreams.fromString(ddlContent) → CodePointCharStream
AntlrDdlParser → Lexer: createNewLexerInstance(CaseChangingCharStream) → L extends Lexer
AntlrDdlParser → CommonTokenStream: new CommonTokenStream(lexer)
AntlrDdlParser → Parser: createNewParserInstance(commonTokenStream) → P extends Parser
AntlrDdlParser: parser.removeErrorListener(ConsoleErrorListener); parser.addErrorListener(ParsingErrorListener)
AntlrDdlParser → Parser: parseTree(parser) → ParseTree
AntlrDdlParser: if no parse errors → createParseTreeWalkerListener() → AntlrDdlParserListener
AntlrDdlParser → ParseTreeWalker: DEFAULT.walk(antlrDdlParserListener, parseTree)
ParseTreeWalker → AntlrDdlParserListener: notifies on each grammar rule (enterXxx/exitXxx)
AntlrDdlParserListener → AntlrDdlParser: signalCreateTable / signalAlterTable / signalDropTable / signalTruncateTable / signalSetVariable
AntlrDdlParser: signals recorded in DdlChanges (implements DdlParserListener)
AntlrDdlParser → BinlogDatabaseSchema: return getAndResetDdlChanges() → DdlChanges
BinlogDatabaseSchema: if ddlChanges.isEmpty() → handleDatabaseEvent(offset, databaseName, sourceTime); add SchemaChangeEvent.ofDatabase(...)
BinlogDatabaseSchema: if !ddlChanges.isEmpty() && acceptableDatabase → DdlChanges.getEventsByDatabase(consumer)
DdlChanges → consumer: iterate events grouped by database name
BinlogDatabaseSchema: per event → handleTableEvent(offset, dbName, tableIds, sourceTime)
BinlogDatabaseSchema: per event type → emitChangeEvent(partition, offset, schemaChangeEvents, dbName, event, tableId, type, snapshot)
emitChangeEvent: if RENAME → SchemaChangeEvent.ofRename(partition, offset, dbName, null, statement, table, previousTableId)
emitChangeEvent: else → SchemaChangeEvent.of(type, partition, offset, dbName, null, statement, table, snapshot)
BinlogDatabaseSchema → parseDdl caller: return List<SchemaChangeEvent>
BinlogConnector → BinlogDatabaseSchema: applySchemaChange(schemaChangeEvent) [called for each returned event]
applySchemaChange: CREATE/ALTER → buildAndRegisterSchema(table); DROP → removeSchema(id)
applySchemaChange: if captureFilter passes → record(schemaChange, tableChanges) [persists to SchemaHistory]

key_methods: parseSnapshotDdl(P partition, String ddlStatements, String databaseName, O offset, Instant sourceTime): List<SchemaChangeEvent>
parseStreamingDdl(P partition, String ddlStatements, String databaseName, O offset, Instant sourceTime): List<SchemaChangeEvent>

key_factories: of(SchemaChangeEventType, Partition, OffsetContext, String db, String schema, String ddl, Table, boolean snapshot)
ofDatabase(Partition, OffsetContext, String databaseName, String ddl, boolean snapshot)
ofRename(Partition, OffsetContext, String db, String schema, String ddl, Table, TableId previousTableId)

TokenStream.note: Used by non-ANTLR parsers (not in the ANTLR DDL pipeline). ANTLR pipeline uses org.antlr.v4.runtime.CommonTokenStream instead.

BinlogAntlrDdlParserTest.generics: <V extends BinlogValueConverters, D extends BinlogDefaultValueConverter, P extends AntlrDdlParser>

key_relationships: BinlogDatabaseSchema composes DdlParser (created via abstract createDdlParser())
DdlChanges groups DdlParserListener.Event objects by database
BinlogDatabaseSchema.applySchemaChange() calls HistorizedRelationalDatabaseSchema.record() for schema history persistence
SchemaChangeEvent constructor auto-populates TableChanges based on event type (CREATE/ALTER/DROP/RENAME)
important_notes: TokenStream (debezium-util) is a general tokenization utility — the ANTLR DDL pipeline uses org.antlr.v4.runtime.CommonTokenStream, not debezium TokenStream
DDL parsing is connector-specific: createDdlParser() is abstract; MySQL and MariaDB provide concrete implementations
ignoredQueryStatements = {BEGIN, END, FLUSH PRIVILEGES} are short-circuited before parsing
DdlChanges.getEventsByDatabase() enables grouping events by affected database, supporting fully-qualified DDL names
applySchemaChange() records to SchemaHistory AFTER building schema (for failure recovery safety)
skipSchemaChangeEvent() filters events for non-captured databases before they reach schema history
SetVariableEvent with order > 0 is suppressed to emit only one change event per SET statement
BinlogAntlrDdlParserTest uses SimpleDdlParserListener to capture and assert events without full connector wiring
